zh.lifeSummary: 當Helen Bertram Baroness of Bothall於1341年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德波塔爾時，她的父親Robert Bertram Baron of Bothal34歲，母親Margaret de Felton33歲。她於大約1350年與Robert de Ogle vp在英國諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她於1368年住在英國倫敦。她去世於1403年12月24日在英國諾圖波藍德波塔爾享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Helen Bertram Baroness of Bothall于1341年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德波塔爾时，她的父亲Robert Bertram Baron of Bothal34岁，母亲Margaret de Felton33岁。她于大约1350年与Robert de Ogle vp在英国諾圖波藍德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她于1368年住在英国倫敦。她去世于1403年12月24日在英国諾圖波藍德波塔爾享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bertram
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German, English (mainly in southeastern Scotland, of Norman origin), French, and Danish: from the ancient Germanic personal name Bertram, composed of the elements berht ‘bright, famous’ + hramn ‘raven’. The raven was the bird of Odin, king of the gods, in ancient Germanic mythology. The personal name was common in France throughout the Middle Ages (especially in the form Bertrand ), where its popularity was increased by the fame of the troubadour Bertrand de Born (c. 1140–1214). The name was taken to England by the Normans in the forms Bertran(d), Bertram, and Bartram.

variants.name: Beltrami
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Dante, Dino, Marco, Pio, Sal, Tullio.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of the personal name Beltrame, from an ancient Germanic name composed of the elements berht ‘bright, famous’ + hramn ‘raven’. See also Bertram .

variants.name: Bartram
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and North German: variant of   Bertram  .

History: William Bartram, a Quaker, had a large farm near Darby, PA, when his eldest son, John, the first American botanist, was born in 1699. John conducted botanical experiments at his own farm in Kingsessing, PA, near Philadelphia.

variants.name: Bertman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Frieda, Wilhelm.
Americanized form of German Bertmann: altered form (by folk etymology) of Bertram .

variants.name: Bethke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Eldor, Ewald, Otto, Rudi, Wilhelmina.
North German: from a pet form of the ancient Germanic personal names   Bertram   or   Berthold  . See also   Beth  .

variants.name: Bertrand
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Andre, Armand, Monique, Francois, Gilles, Raoul, Emile, Herve, Jacques, Jean-Marie, Odette.

French, Walloon, and West Indian (mainly Haiti): from the French personal name Bertrand, a variant of Bertram , coined by folk etymology under the influence of the present participle endings -and, -ant.
History: This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Beltran
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Jesus, Luis, Pedro, Jorge, Mario, Ricardo, Francisco, Rafael.
Spanish (Beltrán), Catalan, and southern French: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements berht ‘bright, famous’ + hramn ‘raven’. See also Bertram .

variants.name: Beltramo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo.
Italian: from the medieval personal name Beltramo, of ancient Germanic origin (see Bertram ).

variants.name: Bert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Philibert, Pierre.
German, French, and Polish: from a short form of various compound personal names formed with ancient Germanic berht ‘bright, famous’ (see for example Bertram ).
English: from the Middle English female personal name Berte (Old French Berte, from ancient Germanic Berta ).

variants.name: Battermann
meanings: German:
possibly an occupational name for a merchant or peddler, from Bartermann.
alternatively, perhaps from a short form of the personal name Bertram + Middle High German man ‘man’.

variants.name: Bertran
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Jorge, Eduardo, Enrique, Joaquin, Ricardo, Aleida, Ana, Ana Maria, Elena, Felipe, Jeronimo.  French Andre.
French, Occitan, and Catalan: variant of   Bertram   or   Bertrand  .

nameMeanings.name: Helen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of the name (Greek Hēlēnē) borne in classical legend by a famous beauty, wife of Menelaus, whose seizure by the Trojan prince Paris sparked off the Trojan War. Her name is of uncertain origin; it may be connected with a word meaning ‘ray’ or ‘sunbeam’ compare Greek hēlios ‘sun’. It has sometimes been taken as connected with the Greek word meaning ‘Greek’, Hellēn, but this is doubtful. In the early Christian period the name was borne by the mother of the Emperor Constantine, who is now usually known by the Latin version of her name, Helena. She is credited with having found the True Cross in Jerusalem. She was born in about 248 , probably in Bithynia. However, in medieval England it was believed that she had been born in Britain, which greatly increased the popularity of the name there.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Helen Bertram Baroness of Bothall was born in 1341, in Bothal, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Bertram Baron of Bothal, was 34 and her mother, Margaret de Felton, was 33. She married Robert de Ogle vp about 1350, in Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She lived in London, England in 1368. She died on 24 December 1403, in Bothal, Northumberland, England, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Helen Bertram Baroness of Bothall est née en 1341, à Bothal, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Bertram Baron of Bothal, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Felton, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Ogle vp environ 1350, à Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle a vécu à Londres, Angleterre en 1368. Elle est décédée le 24 décembre 1403, à Bothal, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Helen Bertram Baroness of Bothall 1341 in Bothal, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Bertram Baron of Bothal 34 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Felton 33. Sie hat um 1350 in Northumberland, England Robert de Ogle vp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. 1368 hat sie in London, England gelebt. Sie starb am 24. Dezember 1403 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Bothal, Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Helen Bertram Baroness of Bothall è nata il nel 1341 nel Bothal, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert Bertram Baron of Bothal, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Felton, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Ogle vp circa 1350, nel Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Vissuto a London, England nel 1368. Morì il 24 dicembre 1403, nel Bothal, Northumberland, England, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Helen Bertram Baroness of Bothallが1341年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドボサルで生まれた時，父Robert Bertram Baron of Bothalは34歳，母Margaret de Feltonは33歳であった。約1350年にイギリスノースウンバーランドでRobert de Ogle vpと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1368年にはイギリスロンドンに住んでいた。彼女は1403年12月24日にイギリスノースウンバーランドボサルで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Helen Bertram Baroness of Bothall(이)가 1341년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 벗할에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Bertram Baron of Bothal(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Felton(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 대략 1350년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 Robert de Ogle vp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1368년도에 영국 런던에서 살았다. 그녀는 1403년 12월 24일 영국 노르스벌랜드 벗할에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Helen Bertram Baroness of Bothall nasceu em 1341, em Bothal, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Bertram Baron of Bothal, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Felton, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Ogle vp aproximadamente 1350, em Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela viveu em London, Inglaterra em 1368. Ela faleceu em 24 de dezembro de 1403, em Bothal, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Helen Bertram Baroness of Bothall родилась в 1341 г. в местности ботэл, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Bertram Baron of Bothal было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Felton, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Ogle vp около 1350 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она жила в местности Лондон, Англия в 1368 году. Она умерла 24 декабря 1403 г. в местности ботэл, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Helen Bertram Baroness of Bothall nació en 1341, en Bothal, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Bertram Baron of Bothal, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Margaret de Felton, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Robert de Ogle vp aproximadamente 1350, en Northumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Vivió en London, Inglaterra en 1368. Murió el 24 de diciembre de 1403, en Bothal, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años.
